property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:/Users/shama/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_23.0.2.v20250131-0604/jre/bin/server;C:/Users/shama/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_23.0.2.v20250131-0604/jre/bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files (x86)\python\Scripts;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\shama\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\shama\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\shama\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\shama\AppData\Roaming\npm;;C:\Windows\system32;;.
